text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... My knees are kind of stiff... I don't think
I'll be able to run well today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
I feel bad after Chiyo invited me, but I'll have to
tell her I can't make it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
"Tout vient à point à qui sait attendre"... Good
things come to those who wait! Right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text: I may not be able to run, but there's something I can do. Time to give my cleats a thorough cleaning!
